steps.title: Match the opening description
steps.content: The sentence begins with an appositive phrase describing a medal recipient. The noun that follows must therefore be the person who received the medals.

steps.title: Name the medal recipient
steps.content: Choice A begins with the result, Choice B begins with the introduction, and Choice C begins with the limits; none can be a medal recipient. The sentence needs Ahmed Zewail as the subject who expanded measurability and introduced femtochemistry. The answer is D.
